description: Repository layout. Top level: `layout_type`, `summary`, optional `global`, plus one key per active role (each holding a list of {name, path, notes?} entries).

summary.description: 2–4 sentences explaining the layout choice and any trade-offs worth flagging.

additionalProperties.description: Sections this scope owns — one entry per `{name, path, notes?}` artefact category.

path.description: File or directory path relative to the project root.

notes.description: One-line explanation of what lands at this path. Omit (empty string) when self-evident.

examples.title: Monorepo layout with frontend, backend, and devops sections

example.summary: Monorepo with separate frontend and backend apps under apps/. Frontend uses Next.js so we surface a stories/ section; backend uses NestJS so modules/ + entities/ get distinct sections. DevOps lives at the repo root since compose and CI are project-wide.

global.name: root_package
global.notes: Root with private:true and shared dev tooling.
